title: Extend use_ecooracle follow-through
description: Teach ecooracle::use_ecooracle() to fill basic .ecosystem.yml metadata from DESCRIPTION/NAMESPACE when the file still contains bootstrap placeholders, and add explicit opt-in follow-through steps for commit, push, package workflow dispatch, and registry discovery.
close_reason: Extended use_ecooracle() to infer basic .ecosystem.yml metadata, prompt or run explicit follow-through steps for commit/push/workflow/discovery, and documented the new behavior.

title: Add R health wrapper for eco-doctor
description: Expose EcoDoctor from the root ecooracle package via check_health()/health(), bundling the canonical eco-doctor.sh script and returning parsed JSON results for repo, release, and registry checks.
close_reason: Added check_health()/health() to the root R package, bundling the canonical eco-doctor.sh and returning parsed EcoDoctor results for repo/release/registry checks.

title: Harden eco-atlas distill auth failure handling
description: Patch the source-of-truth EcoAtlas distill script and template to stop logging raw upstream auth error bodies and to fail fast on invalid OpenAI credentials so CI does not repeatedly leak masked key fragments across snippet retries.
close_reason: Implemented distill auth hardening in source and template; auth failures now redact upstream bodies and abort immediately.

title: Add R helper package for eco-oracle onboarding
description: Create an installable R helper package that exposes ecooracle::use_ecooracle() so R package authors can opt into EcoOracle without relying on curl|bash. It should scaffold .ecosystem.yml, workflow, and tool templates from eco-oracle source-of-truth assets and optionally configure OPENAI_API_KEY via gh when available.
close_reason: Added a root R package with ecooracle::use_ecooracle() wrapping the canonical bootstrap path, documented overwrite-based template refresh for existing repos, and verified both initial scaffold and refresh flows.

title: Add metadata-only fast path for registry/package queries
description: Avoid loading every atlas pack for queries that can be answered from registry metadata alone, starting with eco_packages and similar package-listing paths.

title: Add persistent index snapshot for MCP cold starts
description: Persist the merged eco-oracle index to disk and reload it on subsequent startups within the refresh TTL, so repeated MCP cold starts avoid reloading every atlas pack before serving queries.
close_reason: Implemented persistent eco-index snapshots for MCP cold starts, with disk cache hydration on startup and round-trip test coverage.

title: Fix malformed extracted function signatures
description: Replace pairlist deparse cleanup in eco_atlas_extract.R with explicit formal-argument formatting so extracted signatures preserve missing defaults and ... correctly, and update the template copy in lockstep.
close_reason: Patched eco_atlas_extract.R to format function formals explicitly instead of deparse-cleaning pairlists, fixing malformed exported signatures in both source and template copies.
